List all meshWorkspaceUserGroups with optional filtering and pagination

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}

  parameters={[{"name":"page","in":"query","description":"The page number (default=0). See <<paging,Paging information>>.","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}},{"name":"workspaceIdentifier","in":"query","description":"Filter for meshWorkspaceUserGroups that belong to the meshWorkspace with given identifier. (optional)","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string"}},{"name":"username","in":"query","description":"Filter for meshWorkspaceUserGroups that belong to the meshUser with given username. (optional)","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string"}},{"name":"Accept","in":"header","description":"This endpoint of meshObject API is individually <<versioning,versioned>>. \"ownedByWorkspace\" : \"sample-workspace\"\n      },\n      \"spec\" : {\n        \"displayName\" : \"My User Group\",\n        \"members\" : [ \"sample-user\" ],\n        \"tags\" : { }\n      },\n : 1,\n    \"number\" : 0\n  }\n}"}}}}}}}
>
